# Clayton Cunningham Design

> Portfolio of Clayton Cunningham, a product designer and illustrator based in Atlanta, Georgia. Specialties: end-to-end UI/UX product design, scalable illustration systems, iconography, design systems, and brand identity. Clients include Autotrader, Kelley Blue Book, Coca-Cola, and DICK'S Sporting Goods (Team Sports HQ).

## Case studies

- [DICK'S TSHQ Mobile App](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/tshq-mobile-app.html): Mobile app features that ease the pain of youth sports management
- [TSHQ Registration Redesign](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/tshq-registration.html): Redesigning youth sports registration for over 3 million players and 10,000 teams
- [TSHQ Fan Wear](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/tshq-fanwear-redesign.html): A standalone fan wear store that turned team spirit into club revenue
- [Autotrader Illustration System](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/autotrader-illustration-system.html): A scalable illustration system across web, mobile apps, and marketing
- [Autotrader Iconography](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/autotrader-icons.html): Unifying a fragmented icon language
- [Kelley Blue Book Icons & Illustrations](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/kbb-icons-illustrations.html): Growing a renowned leader's visual library
- [Paradesmith MVP](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/paradesmith.html): An MVP transforming scattered online content into curated community experiences

- [UI/UX Design](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/capabilities-uiux-design.html)

## Process write-ups

- [How to build a scalable illustration system](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/how-to-build-a-scalable-illustration-system.html): Core element libraries, style point of view, spot distillation, and system governance
- [Icon grids and optical corrections](https://www.claytoncunninghamdesign.com/icon-grids-and-optical-corrections.html): Reverse-engineering icon grids, keyshapes, and why optical balance beats mathematical alignment
